# Copilot Instructions

## Character encoding

Use only ASCII characters (U+0000 through U+007F) in all source files,
headers, documentation, and comments. Do not use Unicode dashes,
arrows, Greek letters, mathematical symbols, or any other non-ASCII
characters. Use ASCII substitutes instead:

- `--` instead of em dash (U+2014)
- `-` instead of en dash (U+2013) or minus sign (U+2212)
- `->` instead of right arrow (U+2192)
- `...` instead of ellipsis (U+2026)
- `deg` instead of degree sign (U+00B0)
- `pi` instead of Greek pi (U+03C0)
- `alpha` instead of Greek alpha (U+03B1)
- `theta` instead of Greek theta (U+03B8)
- `*` instead of multiplication sign (U+00D7) or middle dot (U+00B7)
- `+/-` instead of plus-minus sign (U+00B1)
- `<=` instead of less-than-or-equal (U+2264)
- `>=` instead of greater-than-or-equal (U+2265)
- `~=` instead of approximately equal (U+2248)
